name: orinocoflow
description: Minimalist TypeScript workflow engine for AI pipelines

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm && bun build src/index.ts --target node --format cjs --outfile dist/index.cjs && bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target node --format esm && bun build src/cli/compile.ts --outdir dist/cli --target node --format esm && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false
